products.name: Apple iPhone 15
products.description: Experience the ultimate iPhone featuring the Dynamic Island, a 48MP Main camera, and USB-C, all in a durable color-infused glass and aluminum design.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S24
products.description: Welcome to the era of mobile AI. With Galaxy S24, you can unleash whole new levels of creativity, productivity, and possibility starting from your phone.

products.name: Dell XPS 13 Laptop
products.description: Premium thin-and-light laptop with stunning 13.4-inch InfinityEdge display, Intel Core Ultra processor, and premium aluminum chassis.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise canceling wireless headphones with auto NC optimizer, crystal clear hands-free calling, and Alexa voice control.

products.name: Casual Cotton Shirt
products.description: A comfortable, breathable casual shirt crafted from 100% organic cotton. Features a relaxed button-down collar and regular fit.

products.name: Comfort Fleece Hoodie
products.description: Super soft midweight pullover fleece hoodie. Features a front kangaroo pocket, matching drawstring, and ribbed cuffs for warmth.

products.name: Slim Fit Stretch Jeans
products.description: Classic 5-pocket denim jeans with a modern slim fit and added elastane stretch for all-day comfort and flexible movement.

products.name: Designer Embroidered Kurti
products.description: Beautiful women ethnic wear Kurti with premium gold-thread embroidery. Crafted from breathable linen-cotton blend.

products.name: Atomic Habits
products.description: Written by James Clear, this book presents an easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones with tiny, daily changes.

products.name: Rich Dad Poor Dad
products.description: Robert T. Kiyosaki outlines what the rich teach their kids about money that the poor and middle class do not, challenging traditional financial notions.

products.name: Deep Work
products.description: Cal Newport argues that focus is the superpower of the 21st century, providing actionable rules for focused success in a distracted world.

products.name: Solid Oak Dining Table
products.description: Sturdy and elegant dining table constructed from sustainably sourced solid oak wood. Smooth finish, seats up to six comfortability.

products.name: Adjustable LED Study Lamp
products.description: Dimmable desk lamp with 5 color temperatures, USB charging port, flexible goose-neck design, and eye-friendly diffusion filter.

products.name: Modern Silent Wall Clock
products.description: 12-inch modern minimalist wall clock. Silent non-ticking quartz mechanism ensures an accurate time and quiet working environment.

products.name: Premium English Willow Cricket Bat
products.description: Handcrafted English Willow cricket bat with premium cane handle for superb shock absorption, thick edges, and dynamic sweet spot.

products.name: All-Weather Size 5 Football
products.description: Durable synthetic leather match football with machine-stitched seams and butyl bladder for maximum air retention and roundness.

products.name: Eco-Friendly Non-Slip Yoga Mat
products.description: 6mm extra thick TPE yoga mat with dual-sided non-slip texture. Provides premium cushioning, joint protection, and carrying strap.

products.name: Water-Resistant Travel Backpack
products.description: Large capacity 35L backpack with multiple compartments, dedicated 15.6" laptop sleeve, USB charging interface, and lockable zippers.

products.name: Ergonomic Mesh Office Chair
products.description: Desk chair with high back, adjustable lumbar support, 3D armrests, pneumatic tilt lock system, and smooth rolling nylon casters.

products.name: Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle
products.description: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle keeping liquids ice cold for up to 24 hours or hot for up to 12 hours. Sweat-free finish.
